mapper.insert: insert into book_purchase_log (trace_id, purchase_order_id, purchase_order_no, borrow_order_id, borrow_detail_id, log_type, before_data, after_data, change_fields, staff_id, staff_name, client_ip, created_at) values (#{traceId}, #{purchaseOrderId}, #{purchaseOrderNo}, #{borrowOrderId}, #{borrowDetailId}, #{logType}, #{beforeData}, #{afterData}, #{changeFields}, #{staffId}, #{staffName}, #{clientIp}, now())
